overall.description: A cinematic aerial drone shot from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a high-speed approach to the Arasaka Tower in Night City during golden hour. The camera flies over the highway, ascends the iconic skyscraper's facade, and lands on the rooftop overlooking the sprawling futuristic metropolis.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial highway corridor through futuristic downtown

agents.ego_description: flying drone camera approaching the city center at high altitude, maintaining steady forward momentum

notable_agents.action: cars moving along the multi-lane highway below

entered.detail: tall dark skyscraper with distinctive vertical architecture and future neon signage
elevated multi-lane highway with moving traffic and overpass structures
cluster of high-rise buildings with glass and steel facades
hazy mountain range forming the backdrop of the city

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide aerial view of Night City during golden hour. The camera flies steadily toward the Arasaka Tower visible in the distance, while traffic moves along the highway below. The futuristic skyline stretches across the horizon with mountains visible through the atmospheric haze.

events.description: camera begins ascending along the Arasaka Tower facade while maintaining forward momentum
sun creates lens flare as camera approaches the top edge of the building

agents.ego_description: flying upward along the side of the skyscraper, revealing the glowing vertical signage and architectural details

entered.detail: glowing white vertical signage reading ARASAKA mounted on the building facade
detailed geometric panels and structural elements of the tower exterior

segments.scene_description: The camera closes in on the Arasaka Tower, transitioning from a wide city view to an intimate perspective of the building's facade. As the drone ascends the tower's exterior, the vertical neon signage becomes prominent and legible. The highway and distant skyline fade from view as the building fills the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: skyscraper rooftop with panoramic city views

events.description: camera crests the building edge and transitions from vertical ascent to horizontal rooftop traversal

agents.ego_description: moving smoothly across the flat rooftop surface, surveying the cityscape from the elevated vantage point

entered.detail: flat concrete rooftop with geometric paneling and reflective surfaces
mechanical equipment and architectural housing units on the roof
expansive view of the city skyline from the elevated rooftop perspective

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the rooftop of the Arasaka Tower and transitions to a horizontal flight path across the flat surface. The vertical signage and building facade pass out of view as the camera surveys the expansive city panorama. Mechanical structures and equipment are visible on the roof while the golden hour sun illuminates the distant skyline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial trajectory that begins with a wide vista of a futuristic metropolis and culminates in a sweeping rooftop panorama. It begins with a steady flight toward the distant Arasaka Tower, gliding over a highway of moving traffic while the city skyline stretches toward hazy mountains under a golden hour glow. As the camera closes in, the perspective shifts from the expansive city to an intimate ascent up the tower's facade, where vertical neon signage becomes prominent and the distant horizon fades from view. The scene then transitions as the camera reaches the summit, shifting from a vertical climb to a horizontal flight across the flat rooftop. Finally, the building's exterior passes out of sight to reveal mechanical structures and a vast, sun-drenched panorama of the sprawling city below.
